it:96.3: "Kāmayogayutto, bhikkhave, bhavayogayutto āgāmī hoti āgantā itthattaṁ. Kāmayogavisaṁyutto, bhikkhave, bhavayogayutto anāgāmī hoti anāgantā itthattaṁ. Kāmayogavisaṁyutto, bhikkhave, bhavayogavisaṁyutto arahā hoti, khīṇāsavo"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:96.4:
"Kāmayogena saṁyuttā,
bhavayogena cūbhayaṁ;
Sattā gacchanti saṁsāraṁ,
jātimaraṇagāmino.
it:96.5:
Ye ca kāme pahantvāna,
appattā āsavakkhayaṁ;
Bhavayogena saṁyuttā,
anāgāmīti vuccare.
it:96.6:
Ye ca kho chinnasaṁsayā,
khīṇamānapunabbhavā;
Te ve pāraṅgatā loke,
ye pattā āsavakkhayan"ti.
it:96.7:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Sattamaṁ.
Tatiyabhāṇavāraṁ.
